title: Jack and Jill
actors: Lolita Rodriguez, Rogelio de la Rosa, Dolphy
plot: Siblings Benita (Lolita Rodriguez) and Gorio ('Dolphy (I)') play twisted roles: she drives a jeepney, he does all the household chores; she gets into brawls with men, he prefers to be called "Glory." All these they do in support o...
